concerns.text: T036 places power/sample-size justification implementation in code/analyze.py, but plan.md FR/SC Coverage Matrix explicitly assigns FR-010 to Phase 0 research.md document. This is a phase ordering violation: research deliverable should precede implementation tasks.

T021-T025 (US2 metrics) marked [P] but depend on T015 (inference from US1). Plan claims 'all user stories can start in parallel' but US2 metrics logging requires US1's inference output. Cross-story dependency breaks parallel safety claim.

T028-T036 (US3 analysis) depend on T018 and T023 (result CSVs from US1/US2). Plan claims US3 can start after Foundational phase, but analysis requires US1 and US2 outputs. Cross-story dependency violates independent-shippable-unit requirement for US blocks.

Section states 'User stories can then proceed in parallel (if staffed)' but task dependencies show US2 requires US1 inference output and US3 requires US1+US2 CSV outputs. This contradicts the parallel execution claim and should be corrected to reflect true dependency chain.
